title: CockroachDB Cluster
description: Schema representing a CockroachDB Cloud cluster, which is an instance of CockroachDB running in one or more cloud regions on Serverless or Dedicated infrastructure.

id.description: Unique identifier of the cluster assigned by CockroachDB Cloud.

cloud_provider.description: Cloud infrastructure provider hosting the cluster.

cockroach_version.description: Version string of CockroachDB running on the cluster (e.g. v23.1.0).

plan.description: Service tier of the cluster, either Serverless or Dedicated.

state.description: Overall lifecycle state of the cluster.

operation_status.description: Current operational status reflecting any in-progress or failed operations.

regions.description: Cloud provider regions where the cluster is deployed. Multi-region clusters have multiple entries.

config.description: Configuration settings for the cluster, containing either serverless or dedicated configuration.

creator_id.description: Identifier of the user who created the cluster.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the cluster was created.

updated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of the most recent modification to the cluster.

deleted_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the cluster was deleted. Only present for deleted clusters.

sql_dns.description: DNS hostname used for SQL connections to the cluster.

upgrade_status.description: Status of any in-progress version upgrade operation.

account_id.description: Cloud provider account ID for the cluster, used for trust relationship configuration.

parent_id.description: Folder ID of the folder containing this cluster, if any.

labels.description: User-defined key-value labels attached to the cluster for organization and filtering.

delete_protection.description: Whether delete protection is enabled, preventing accidental cluster deletion.

egress_traffic_policy.description: Policy governing outbound network traffic from the cluster.

network_visibility.description: Network accessibility configuration controlling whether the cluster is publicly accessible.

azure_cluster_identity_client_id.description: Client ID of the Azure cluster identity, present for Azure deployments that support CMEK.

cidr_range.description: IPv4 CIDR range reserved for the cluster. Only set on GCP Advanced tier clusters.

customer_cloud_account.description: Customer cloud account details for BYOC (Bring Your Own Cloud) deployments.

Region.description: A geographic region where the cluster or its nodes are deployed.

name.description: Cloud provider region identifier (e.g. us-east-1, us-central1).

sql_dns.description: DNS hostname for SQL connections routed specifically to this region.

node_count.description: Number of CockroachDB nodes deployed in this region.

primary.description: Whether this is the primary region for a multi-region cluster.

ClusterConfig.description: Configuration container for a cluster, holding either serverless or dedicated settings.

serverless.description: Configuration specific to Serverless clusters. Present when plan is SERVERLESS.

dedicated.description: Configuration specific to Dedicated clusters. Present when plan is DEDICATED.

ServerlessClusterConfig.description: Configuration specific to a CockroachDB Serverless cluster.

spend_limit.description: Monthly spend limit in US cents. Set to 0 for unlimited spend.

routing_id.description: Unique routing identifier used to route SQL connections to the correct serverless cluster.

usage_limits.description: Request unit and storage limits for the serverless cluster.

UsageLimits.description: Usage-based limits for a Serverless cluster.

request_unit_limit.description: Maximum number of request units per month. 0 means no limit.

storage_mib_limit.description: Maximum storage in mebibytes. 0 means no limit.

DedicatedClusterConfig.description: Configuration specific to a CockroachDB Dedicated cluster.

machine_type.description: Machine type used for cluster nodes (e.g. m5.xlarge on AWS).

num_virtual_cpus.description: Number of virtual CPUs allocated per node.

storage_gib.description: Storage capacity per node in gibibytes.

disk_iops.description: Disk input/output operations per second allocated per node.

CustomerCloudAccount.description: Customer cloud account details for Bring Your Own Cloud (BYOC) cluster deployments.

id.description: Cloud provider account or project ID.

provider.description: Cloud provider for the customer account.

AllowlistEntry.description: An IP allowlist entry defining a CIDR range authorized to connect to the cluster.

cidr_ip.description: IPv4 base address of the CIDR range.

cidr_mask.description: Prefix length of the CIDR range (e.g. 24 for /24).

name.description: Human-readable label for this allowlist entry (e.g. office-network).

ui.description: Whether this entry grants access to the DB Console web interface.

sql.description: Whether this entry grants SQL connection access.

MaintenanceWindow.description: Defines the preferred time window for automatic maintenance and version upgrade operations.

day_of_week.description: Day of the week for the maintenance window. 0=Sunday through 6=Saturday.

start_hour.description: Hour of day in UTC when the maintenance window begins (0-23).

CMEKRegionSpec.description: Customer-managed encryption key specification for a specific cloud region.

region.description: Cloud provider region this key specification applies to.

key.description: Encryption key specification for this region.

CMEKKeySpec.description: Specification for a customer-managed encryption key.

type.description: Type of encryption key. AWS_KMS for AWS, GCP_CLOUD_KMS for GCP.

uri.description: Full URI of the customer-managed key in the cloud provider's KMS.

auth_principal.description: IAM role ARN (AWS) or service account email (GCP) used to access the key.

LogExportGroup.description: A log channel group configuration for selective log export.

log_name.description: Name of the log group or stream in the destination service.

channels.description: List of CockroachDB log channel names to include in this group.

min_level.description: Minimum severity level of log entries to export.

redact.description: Whether to redact sensitive information from log entries before export.

BackupConfiguration.description: Backup retention and frequency settings for a CockroachDB cluster.

cluster_id.description: ID of the cluster this backup configuration applies to.

frequency_minutes.description: How often automated backups are taken, in minutes.

retention_days.description: Number of days automated backups are retained before deletion.
